ItacPersonItem.Notes: For Gimma`s biography and academic activity, see the entry by C. Preti, in DBI. Gimma joined the Accademia del Platano in July 1694, and the Infecondi in August 1694 - where he also discussed his impresa - and the Uniti in February 1695. For more details about the dates and the various Academies to which Gimma was ascribed, see Giacinto Gimma, `Introduzione`, in Elogi Accademici della societa` degli Spensierati di Rossano, vol. 2 (Napoli: Troise, 1703).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
